sessions.name: Find the hidden rhythm
sessions.description: A noisy ~24 h signal (7 days, hourly). Use the periodogram to recover the hidden period.
sessions.keywords: find the hidden rhythm a noisy ~24 h signal (7 days, hourly). use the periodogram to recover the hidden period. classroom nz yr 11–13 periodogram

sessions.name: Am I a night owl?
sessions.description: A week of activity for one "person". Read the actogram and decide: morning lark or evening owl?

curriculum.title: How animals carry out life processes
How an animal maintains a stable internal environment (L3, 3cr, Internal)

sessions.keywords: am i a night owl? a week of activity for one "person". read the actogram and decide: morning lark or evening owl? classroom nz yr 9–13 actogram

sessions.name: Is the difference real?
sessions.description: Weekday vs weekend activity. Compare the groups and decide whether the difference is real or chance.

curriculum.title: Use statistical methods to make an inference (L2, 4cr, Internal)
Use statistical methods to make a formal inference (L3, 4cr, Internal)

sessions.keywords: is the difference real? weekday vs weekend activity. compare the groups and decide whether the difference is real or chance. classroom nz yr 11–13 boxplot

sessions.name: Sine waves are everywhere
sessions.description: Fit a single cosine to a rhythm. Read amplitude, phase, midline, period and R²; compare with the truth.
sessions.keywords: sine waves are everywhere fit a single cosine to a rhythm. read amplitude, phase, midline, period and r²; compare with the truth. classroom nz yr 12–13 scatterplot
